title: Driven Restructuring, Signaling a New Era of Automated Efficiency Over Human Labor – NaturalNews.com
description: Internet infrastructure company Cloudflare announced plans to cut approximately 20% of its workforce, affecting about 1,100 employees, as the company shifts toward greater reliance on artificial intelligence. The layoffs were disclosed on May 8, 2026, as part of the company’s first-quarter earnings report. According to TechCrunch, the decision was attributed to increasing adoption of AI […]

title: Psychologist Lisa Damour Has Advice on Teens and AI
description: A universal truth about parenting is that the second you think you’ve got a handle on a difficult stage in your child’s development — sleepless nights, the terrible twos, puberty — everything changes. For parents of teens, nothing captures that constant scramble more than trying to keep up with technology. First the worry was phones, then wave after wave of social media. Now? Artificial intelligence.
content: A universal truth about parenting is that the second you think you’ve got a handle on a difficult stage in your child’s development — sleepless nights, the terrible twos, puberty — everything changes. For parents of teens, nothing captures that const... [500 chars]

title: AI, semiconductors, railways to power India's next phase of transformation: Ashwini Vaishnaw
description: Calling Artificial Intelligence one of the most transformative technological revolutions in history, Vaishnaw said AI is reshaping the world at an unprecedented pace.
content:

title: EU Commission in talks with OpenAI and Anthropic over AI models
description: The European Commission is actively engaging with leading AI firms OpenAI and Anthropic. Discussions are underway to understand their advanced artificial intelligence models. OpenAI is proactively offering access to its new AI model. The Commission has held several meetings with Anthropic, exploring potential collaborations. These talks signal a growing focus on AI development and regulation within Europe.
content:

title: A great code bloat is arising as AI turns managers into software programmers
description: Everyone can now use artificial intelligence (AI) to create software code, but ensuring that these systems actually work reliably is quite another matter. Indeed, this may become the next big role for the software specialists of India’s IT service firms.
content: I recently watched a chief operating officer with a terrifyingly efficient grasp of logistics and a newfound affection for AI models build a global inventory tracker in an afternoon. It was a masterpiece of ‘vibe coding.’ It looked and felt right. To... [5917 chars]

title: Africa Faces GW-Scale Energy Challenge as AI Boom Drives Explosive Data Center Demand
description: The rapid adoption of artificial intelligence technologies is driving one of the largest structural shifts in global electricity consumption in decades.
content:
The global artificial intelligence revolution is rapidly transforming the world's energy landscape, and Africa is now facing mounting pressure to overhaul its electricity planning models as data center demand accelerates toward unprecedented scale.

title: Adani calls for India to build, power, and own AI infrastructure on home soil
description: NEW DELHI, May 11:  Billionaire Gautam Adani said on Monday that energy security and digital infrastructure would define geopolitical power in the coming decades, as he called on India to build sovereign capabilities across the artificial intelligence value chain. Addressing the Confederation of Indian Industry’s (CII) Annual Business Summit 2026, the chairman of the Adani Group said the assumptions underpinning decades of globalisation were being dismantled amid rising geopolitical fragmentation. “The world that is emerging is not flat. It is […]
